notes: First meeting of the year. New officer intros, club roadmap, and project sign-ups.
Members demo their projects. Voted for the best project of the year.
Deep dive into how RLHF shapes modern LLMs — reward modeling, PPO fine-tuning, and Constitutional AI.
Rohan walked through his path from UT Austin to Meta AI, and demoed their internal tooling for large-scale model eval.

topic: Intro to RAG: Building a Smarter Chatbot
notes: Hands-on workshop — members built a basic RAG pipeline over a custom document set using LangChain and ChromaDB.

topic: Transformers Deep Dive — Attention Is All You Need
notes: Walked through the original 2017 paper, explained positional encoding, multi-head attention, and why it killed RNNs.
Covered convolutions, pooling, ResNet architecture, and live-demoed a webcam object detection model.
Team formation, problem-set review, and 30-minute rapid prototyping drill.

topic: Reinforcement Learning 101 — From Bandits to PPO
notes: Survey of RL algorithms: multi-armed bandits, Q-learning, policy gradients. Arjun's MarketBot served as a live example.
Members pitched spring project ideas. 8 projects greenlit for the semester.
